description: Price and value forward commitments — arbitrage-free carry model, equity/IR/FX/fixed-income forwards, interest rate and currency swaps, equity swap pricing and valuation

fields.name: contract_type
fields.label: equity_forward | ir_forward | fx_forward | fi_forward | ir_swap | fx_swap | equity_swap

arbitrage_free_principle.law_of_one_price: Forward price set so no riskless profit exists
arbitrage_free_principle.replication: Long forward = leveraged long spot minus carry costs

carry_arbitrage_no_cash_flows.interpretation: Future value of spot at risk-free rate

carry_arbitrage_with_cash_flows.cash_flows: Dividends, coupons, storage costs, convenience yield

equity_forwards_futures.dividend_adjusted: Subtract PV of dividends from spot

ir_forwards_fra.fra_payoff: Notional × (MRR − FRA rate) × period / (1 + MRR × period)
ir_forwards_fra.settlement: Discounted at MRR; paid at start of reference period

forward_vs_futures.marking_to_market: Futures marked daily; T-bills as margin
forward_vs_futures.convexity_adjustment: IR futures priced below equivalent forwards

ir_swap.fixed_rate: Set so swap has zero value at inception
ir_swap.value_after_inception: PV of remaining fixed − PV of remaining floating

fx_swap.pricing: Based on covered interest rate parity
fx_swap.value: Difference in PV of fixed legs in two currencies

equity_swap.pay_fixed_receive_equity: Value = equity leg value − fixed annuity value
equity_swap.pricing: Fixed rate = equity expected return minus funding spread; equilibrium sets zero value

price_forward_commitment.description: Price or value forward commitment contract

errors.message: contract_type must be one of the supported forward commitment types

anti_patterns.rule: Do not confuse the forward price with the forward contract value
anti_patterns.why: Forward price is set at inception so value=0; as rates/spot evolve, the contract acquires positive or negative value — these are distinct calculations

anti_patterns.rule: Do not apply the same forward formula regardless of underlying cash flows
anti_patterns.why: Equities with dividends, coupon bonds, and FX pairs each require carry adjustments; the no-cash-flow formula overstates the forward price when income exists

anti_patterns.rule: Do not ignore the daily settlement difference between forwards and futures
anti_patterns.why: Futures convexity adjustment (T-bill financing on marked gains) makes IR futures systematically cheaper than equivalent forward rate agreements

goals.description: Price and value forward commitments — arbitrage-free carry model, equity/IR/FX/fixed-income forwards, interest rate and currency swaps, equity swap pricing and valuation

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
